mapper.insert: insert into tbl_bookmark (member_id, post_id, folder_id) values (#{memberId}, #{postId}, #{folderId})
mapper.sql: b.id as id, b.member_id as member_id, b.post_id as post_id, null as news_id, 'post' as bookmark_type, b.folder_id as folder_id, b.created_datetime as created_datetime, p.member_id as post_member_id, p.title as post_title, p.content as post_content, coalesce(m.member_nickname, m.member_name) as member_nickname, m.member_handle as member_handle, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = p.member_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name, (select count(*) from tbl_post_like pl where pl.post_id = p.id) as like_count, (select count(*) from tbl_post rp where rp.reply_post_id = p.id and rp.post_status = 'active') as reply_count, (select count(*) from tbl_bookmark bk where bk.post_id = p.id) as bookmark_count

nb.id as id, nb.member_id as member_id, null as post_id, nb.news_id as news_id, 'news' as bookmark_type, nb.folder_id as folder_id, nb.created_datetime as created_datetime, null as post_member_id, n.news_title as post_title, n.news_content as post_content, '뉴스' as member_nickname, '@news' as member_handle, null as member_profile_file_name, (select count(*) from tbl_news_like nl where nl.news_id = n.id) as like_count, 0 as reply_count, (select count(*) from tbl_news_bookmark nbk where nbk.news_id = n.id) as bookmark_count
mapper.select: select id, member_id, post_id, news_id, bookmark_type, folder_id, created_datetime, post_member_id, post_title, post_content, member_nickname, member_handle, member_profile_file_name, like_count, reply_count, bookmark_count, liked from ( select , case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_post_like pl2 where pl2.post_id = p.id and pl2.member_id = b.member_id ) then 1 else 0 end as liked from tbl_bookmark b left join tbl_post p on b.post_id = p.id left join tbl_member m on p.member_id = m.id where b.folder_id = #{folderId} and not exists ( select 1 from tbl_report r where r.target_id = p.id and r.reporter_id = b.member_id and r.target_type = 'post' ) union all select , case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_news_like nl2 where nl2.news_id = n.id and nl2.member_id = nb.member_id ) then 1 else 0 end as liked from tbl_news_bookmark nb left join tbl_news n on nb.news_id = n.id where nb.folder_id = #{folderId} ) merged order by created_datetime desc
